metadata.description: AI codes fast. Raven keeps it disciplined — think, structure, secure. Think: a plan before any edit, challenged from three angles, approved by you. Structure: the right specialist for every prompt — 61, routed deterministically, never silently. Secure: local hooks block secrets, vulnerable libraries, and edits until the thinking happened. Scales from one repo to a whole team. All on your machine. Zero telemetry. MIT.
